title: gahnia lanigera
intro: Gahnia lanigera, also known as Woolly Saw-sedge, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cyperaceae, native to eastern Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with roots and rhizomes said to have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating wounds. In herbal preparations, the roots and rhizomes of Gahnia lanigera can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
